  name: Bug Report
  about: Report a bug in the Seven Chain Bridge Solver
  title: '[BUG] '
  labels: bug
  assignees: ''
  ---

  ## Bug Description

  A clear description of the bug.

  ## Steps to Reproduce

  1. Configure .env with your settings
  2. Run npm run dev
  3. See error: ...

  ## Expected Behavior

  What you expected to happen.

  ## Actual Behavior

  What actually happened.

  ## Environment

  - OS: e.g. Ubuntu 22.04
  - Node.js version: e.g. 20.0.0
  - Solver version: e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash
  - SUPPORTED_CHAINS: e.g. ETH,BNB

  ## Logs

  Paste relevant logs here.

  ## Additional Context

  Any other context about the problem.
